admitted_facts.fact: The repository implements a forward-looking scenario simulation structure beginning in 2026.
The model must distinguish verified facts, filed claims, reported claims, user inputs, assumptions, stress tests, unknowns, confidential inputs, and derived outputs.
A one-terawatt value must be treated as a scenario/stress-test assumption unless separately verified.
Any claimed electrical load must identify a comparable heat-rejection pathway.

excluded_claims: No verified Terafab operating site load is asserted.
No verified Terafab water permit value is asserted.
No proprietary Terafab data are included.
